title: lysimachia henryi var. guizhouensis
intro: Lysimachia henryi var. guizhouensis, also known as Guizhou Golden Cinnamon or Golden Coin, is a variety of the Lysimachia henryi plant, a type of flowering perennial plant native to China. This plant has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lysimachia henryi var. guizhouensis include its potential to reduce blood pressure, improve digestion, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. Lysimachia henryi var. guizhouensis is commonly used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
